title: cladocolea tehuacanensis
intro: Cladocolea tehuacanensis, also known as a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, is a type of epiphytic herb native to Mexico. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Cladocolea tehuacanensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in the treatment of digestive problems. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used in the form of a tincture or topical application.
